description: Close the top parity gaps identified in the parity matrix. MCP at 23% coverage is the weakest surface. 60 orphaned REST endpoints need cleanup. ADR-2603222229.

phases.name: Fix undiscoverable MCP tools
phases.description: 5 inference tools are implemented in dispatch_tool() but missing from mcp-tools.json. hex_analyze_json is in mcp-tools.json but has no dispatch handler. Quick wins.

tasks.name: Add 5 inference tools to mcp-tools.json
tasks.description: Add hex_inference_add, hex_inference_list, hex_inference_test, hex_inference_discover, hex_inference_remove to config/mcp-tools.json with proper inputSchema. Sync to hex-cli/assets/schemas/mcp-tools.json.

tasks.name: Implement hex_analyze_json dispatch
tasks.description: Add hex_analyze_json case to dispatch_tool() in mcp.rs. Should call same /api/analyze endpoint but return raw JSON instead of formatted text.

tasks.name: Add hex task assign CLI command
tasks.description: Add Assign variant to TaskAction in hex-cli/src/commands/task.rs. MCP tool hex_hexflo_task_assign exists but no CLI equivalent.

phases.name: Add enforcement + test MCP tools
phases.description: Enforcement and test commands exist in CLI but have zero MCP coverage. These are critical for open-model agents.

tasks.name: Add enforce MCP tools
tasks.description: Add hex_enforce_list, hex_enforce_mode, hex_enforce_sync, hex_enforce_prompt to mcp-tools.json and dispatch_tool(). These let any MCP client query and manage enforcement rules.

tasks.name: Add test MCP tools
tasks.description: Add hex_test_history, hex_test_trends to mcp-tools.json and dispatch_tool(). These let agents query test health without CLI access.

tasks.name: Add project MCP tools
tasks.description: Add hex_project_list, hex_project_register to mcp-tools.json and dispatch_tool(). Project management is CLI-only today.

phases.name: Add dashboard panes for CLI-only features
phases.description: Add dashboard views for features that currently only exist in CLI.

tasks.name: Add inbox notification panel
tasks.description: Create InboxPane.tsx in hex-nexus/assets/src/components/. Show unacked notifications with priority, source, payload. Ack button. REST: GET /api/hexflo/inbox/{agent_id}, PATCH /api/hexflo/inbox/{id}/ack.

tasks.name: Add enforcement rules panel
tasks.description: Create EnforcementPane.tsx. Show all rules (local + SpacetimeDB), enforcement mode, enable/disable toggle. REST: GET /api/hexflo/enforcement-rules.

tasks.name: Add test health panel
tasks.description: Create TestHealthPane.tsx. Show recent test sessions, pass/fail trends, flaky tests. REST: GET /api/test-sessions, /api/test-sessions/trends, /api/test-sessions/flaky.

phases.name: Audit and clean orphaned REST endpoints
phases.description: 60 REST endpoints (41%) have zero consumers. Deprecate or remove them.

tasks.name: Classify orphaned endpoints
tasks.description: For each of the 60 orphaned endpoints: mark as keep (will gain consumer), deprecate (add X-Deprecated header), or remove. Focus on: 13 coordination endpoints, 6 RL endpoints, 5 per-project query endpoints.

tasks.name: Remove or deprecate endpoints
tasks.description: Execute decisions from P4.1. Remove endpoints marked for removal. Add deprecation_layer to endpoints marked for deprecation.

success_metrics: All implemented MCP tools are discoverable in mcp-tools.json
Dashboard has inbox, enforcement, and test health panels
Orphaned REST endpoints classified and actioned
